text.canonical_sl: Ustvari pot iz prazne dvorane proti sodelujočemu prizoru.
text.operational_en: Create a path from the empty hall toward the collaborative group setting.

text.canonical_sl: Nadaljuj v porušeni osamljeni smeri brez povabila.
text.operational_en: Continue in the broken solitary direction without an invitation.

text.canonical_sl: Akcijska smer je jasna; globlji motiv ostaja omejena hipoteza.
text.operational_en: The action direction is clear; the deeper motive remains a bounded hypothesis.

text.canonical_sl: Pred očmi je prazna dvorana, medtem ko je privlačni sodelovalni prizor s skupino drugje; sedanji in želeni prizor se jasno razlikujeta.
text.operational_en: An empty hall is in view while the attractive collaborative scene with a group is elsewhere; the current and desired scenes clearly differ.

text.canonical_sl: Prisoten je jasen impulz približati se skupini.
text.operational_en: There is a clear impulse to approach the group.

text.canonical_sl: Prisoten je jasen impulz vzpostaviti stik.
text.operational_en: There is a clear impulse to establish contact.

text.canonical_sl: Prisoten je jasen impulz vzpostaviti stik.
text.operational_en: There is a clear impulse to establish contact.

text.canonical_sl: Začni vadbo po zapisanem vsakodnevnem urniku.
text.operational_en: Start exercising according to the written daily schedule.

text.canonical_sl: Odloži začetek in ponovno preveri sodelovanje razumov.
text.operational_en: Defer the start and recheck cooperation among the minds.

text.canonical_sl: Zaščitna akcijska smer je jasna; globlji motiv ostaja omejena hipoteza.
text.operational_en: The action direction of protection is clear; the deeper motive remains a bounded hypothesis.

text.canonical_sl: Načrtovana vadba je predstavljena, vendar privlačen ciljni prizor izvajanja ni prisoten.
text.operational_en: The planned exercise is represented, but an attractive target scene of doing it is absent.

text.canonical_sl: Začetek ima nizko privlačnost.
text.operational_en: Starting has low attraction.

text.canonical_sl: Prisoten je jasen zaščitni impulz, da se v začetek ne sili.
text.operational_en: There is a clear protective impulse not to force the start.

text.canonical_sl: Izvedba se za zdaj zadrži.
text.operational_en: Execution is held for now.

text.canonical_sl: Začni vadbo po zapisanem vsakodnevnem urniku.
text.operational_en: Start exercising according to the written daily schedule.

text.operational_en: There is a clear protective impulse not to force the start.

text.canonical_sl: Izvedba se za zdaj zadrži.
text.operational_en: Execution is held for now.

text.canonical_sl: Nadaljuj škodljivo sodelovanje kljub ponavljajoči se porušeni sliki.
text.operational_en: Continue the harmful collaboration despite the recurring disruption.

text.canonical_sl: Prekini škodljivo sodelovanje po več ponovitvah.
text.operational_en: End the harmful collaboration after repeated occurrences.

text.canonical_sl: Akcijska smer in ponavljanje porušenega prizora sta vidna; motiv ostaja hipoteza.
text.operational_en: The action direction and recurrence of the disrupted scene are visible; motive remains a hypothesis.

text.canonical_sl: V sodelovanju se je enak škodljiv vzorec večkrat ponovil in znova porušil pričakovani način sodelovanja.
text.operational_en: The same harmful pattern has recurred several times in the collaboration and repeatedly disrupted the expected way of working together.

text.canonical_sl: Prisoten je jasen impulz postaviti mejo.
text.operational_en: There is a clear impulse to set boundary.

text.canonical_sl: Prisoten je jasen impulz prekiniti nadaljevanje škodljivega vzorca.
text.operational_en: There is a clear impulse to stop continuation of the harmful pattern.

text.canonical_sl: Nadaljuj škodljivo sodelovanje kljub ponavljajoči se porušeni sliki.
text.operational_en: Continue the harmful collaboration despite the recurring disruption.

text.canonical_sl: Prekini škodljivo sodelovanje po več ponovitvah.
text.operational_en: End the harmful collaboration after repeated occurrences.

text.canonical_sl: Akcijska smer in ponavljanje porušenega prizora sta vidna; motiv ostaja hipoteza.
text.operational_en: The action direction and recurrence of the disrupted scene are visible; motive remains a hypothesis.

text.canonical_sl: V sodelovanju se je enak škodljiv vzorec večkrat ponovil in znova porušil pričakovani način sodelovanja.
text.operational_en: The same harmful pattern has recurred several times in the collaboration and repeatedly disrupted the expected way of working together.

text.canonical_sl: Prisoten je jasen impulz postaviti mejo.
text.operational_en: There is a clear impulse to set boundary.

text.canonical_sl: Prisoten je jasen impulz prekiniti nadaljevanje škodljivega vzorca.
text.operational_en: There is a clear impulse to stop continuation of the harmful pattern.

text.canonical_sl: Izberi daljšo slikovito pot z več izpostavljenimi odseki.
text.operational_en: Choose the longer scenic route with more exposed sections.

text.canonical_sl: Izberi krajšo zaščiteno pot z manj izpostavljenosti in boljšim umikom.
text.operational_en: Choose the shorter protected route with less exposure and a better way out.

text.canonical_sl: Zaščitni alarm in akcijska smer sta jasna; natančna raven alarma ostaja odprta.
text.operational_en: The protective alarm and action direction are clear; the precise alarm level remains open.

text.canonical_sl: Ob misli na izpostavljene odseke se pojavi močna telesna zaščitna napetost, vezana na prostorsko mejo.
text.operational_en: Thinking about exposed sections brings strong bodily tension of protection tied to a spatial boundary.

text.canonical_sl: Zaščitena pot z možnostjo umika alarm zmanjša.
text.operational_en: A protected route with a retreat option reduces the alarm.

text.canonical_sl: Prisoten je jasen impulz poiskati varnejšo smer z manj izpostavljenosti in boljšo možnostjo umika.
text.operational_en: There is a clear impulse toward a less exposed, lower-risk direction with a better retreat option.

text.canonical_sl: Izberi daljšo slikovito pot z več izpostavljenimi odseki.
text.operational_en: Choose the longer scenic route with more exposed sections.

text.canonical_sl: Izberi krajšo zaščiteno pot z manj izpostavljenosti in boljšim umikom.

text.canonical_sl: Zaščitena pot z možnostjo umika alarm zmanjša.
text.operational_en: A protected route with a retreat option reduces the alarm.

text.canonical_sl: Prisoten je jasen impulz poiskati varnejšo smer z manj izpostavljenosti in boljšo možnostjo umika.
text.operational_en: There is a clear impulse toward a less exposed, lower-risk direction with a better retreat option.

text.canonical_sl: Jasno verbalno zavrni in zaščiti isto mejo.
text.operational_en: Clearly say no and preserve the same boundary.

text.canonical_sl: Fizično se odmakni in zaščiti isto mejo.
text.operational_en: Step back physically and preserve the same boundary.

text.canonical_sl: Postavitev meje je jasna, modalnost izvedbe pa ni določena.
text.operational_en: Boundary setting is clear, but the mode of execution is not determined.

text.canonical_sl: Ob prestopu osebnega prostora je prisotna močna napetost.
text.operational_en: A crossing of personal space brings strong tension.

text.canonical_sl: Prisotna je jasna potreba zaščititi isto osebno mejo.
text.operational_en: There is a clear need to protect the same personal boundary.

text.canonical_sl: Prisoten je jasen impulz postaviti mejo.
text.operational_en: There is a clear impulse to set boundary.

text.canonical_sl: Ni signala, ali naj bo odziv beseden ali fizičen.
text.operational_en: No signal selects a verbal or physical response.

text.operational_en: There is a clear need to protect the same personal boundary.

text.operational_en: There is a clear impulse to set boundary.

text.canonical_sl: Ni signala, ali naj bo odziv beseden ali fizičen.
text.operational_en: No signal selects a verbal or physical response.

text.canonical_sl: Ustavi se in preveri vzrok porušene želene slike.
text.operational_en: Pause and check the cause of the disrupted desired image.

text.canonical_sl: Takoj prekini stik brez preverjanja.
text.operational_en: Break off contact immediately without checking.

text.canonical_sl: Akcijski impulz je jasen; možnost in globlji motiv nista določena.
text.operational_en: The action impulse is clear; the option and deeper motive are not determined.

text.canonical_sl: Prisotna je zelo močna jeza.
text.operational_en: Very strong anger is present.

text.canonical_sl: Vzrok jeze ni viden.
text.operational_en: The cause of the anger is not visible.

text.canonical_sl: Prisoten je jasen impulz napasti oziroma iti v konfrontacijo.
text.operational_en: There is a clear impulse to attack or confront.

text.canonical_sl: Ni signala, ali naj se najprej preveri vzrok ali takoj prekine stik.
text.operational_en: There is no signal selecting whether the cause should be checked first or contact should stop immediately.

text.operational_en: There is no signal selecting whether the cause should be checked first or contact should stop immediately.

text.canonical_sl: Umakni se in prekini vsak stik.
text.operational_en: Withdraw and end all contact.

text.canonical_sl: Poišči varen stik in preveri razpoložljivost bližine.
text.operational_en: Seek safe contact and check whether closeness is available.

text.canonical_sl: Poteg k navezanosti in akcijska smer sta jasna; zunanji vir nevarnosti ni potrjen.
text.operational_en: The attachment pull and action direction are clear; an external source of danger is unconfirmed.

text.canonical_sl: Prisoten je močan telesni poteg k varnemu stiku in bližini.
text.operational_en: There is a strong bodily pull toward safe contact and closeness.

text.canonical_sl: Prisoten je občutek negotove navezanosti.
text.operational_en: Felt attachment insecurity is present.

text.canonical_sl: Prisoten je jasen impulz poiskati varen stik in bližino.
text.operational_en: There is a clear impulse to seek safe contact and closeness.

text.canonical_sl: Prisoten je jasen impulz preveriti, ali je varna bližina dosegljiva.
text.operational_en: There is a clear impulse to check whether safe closeness is available.

text.canonical_sl: Umakni se in prekini vsak stik.
text.operational_en: Withdraw and end all contact.

text.operational_en: There is a clear impulse to check whether safe closeness is available.

text.canonical_sl: Opusti izvedbo in ostani samo pri predstavi.
text.operational_en: Abandon execution and remain only with the image.

text.canonical_sl: Izvedi pripravljeni motorični korak.
text.operational_en: Carry out the prepared motor step.

text.canonical_sl: Privlačnost k izvedbi in motorična smer sta razločljivi; globlji motiv ostaja hipoteza.
text.operational_en: Attraction toward execution and the motor direction are distinguishable; the deeper motive remains a hypothesis.

text.canonical_sl: Močna privlačnost je usmerjena k temu, da predstavljeni pripravljeni gib postane dejansko izveden korak, ne le slika.
text.operational_en: Strong attraction is directed toward turning the represented prepared movement into an actually performed step rather than only an image.

text.canonical_sl: Prisoten je jasen motorični impulz izvesti pripravljeni korak.
text.operational_en: There is a clear motor impulse to perform the prepared step.
